title: Iran Denies Attack on Lanaz Oil Refinery in Northern Iraq
summary: Iran and allied Iraqi militia groups denied attacking the Lanaz oil refinery in northern Iraq, the semi-official Tasnim news agency reported, citing an unnamed military official.

title: Vietnam to Elect New Parliament, Paving Way for Next Leadership
summary: Some 78 million Vietnamese will cast votes on Sunday for parliamentary delegates, setting the stage for the country’s new president and prime minister to be confirmed when the National Assembly meets next month.

title: Trump’s War Jolts Global Central Banks From Fed to ECB to BOJ
summary: Central banks from Washington to London to Jakarta are about to make their first assessments of economic damage after more than two weeks of conflict between the US and Iran.

title: JPMorgan Makes Bold Push to Offload Huge LBO Debt
summary: Jamie Dimon has been warning for weeks — months, even — that the credit cycle will eventually sour. Now, his bank is about to test investors’ appetites.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 3/14/2026
